thought.text: Now I need to update the location calculation in print_token:

{"command": "str_replace", "path": "/workspace/YatCC/task/1/antlr/main.cpp", "old_str": "// Get location information

                        std::to_string(token->getCharPositionInLine() + 1) +

  std::string locInfo = " Loc=<" + fileInfo.currentFile + ":" + std::to_string(actualLine) + ":" +
                        std::to_string(token->getCharPositionInLine() + 1) +
                        ">";"}
